attacking_style: Attacks on final climbs from breakaways or reduced groups, often late (final climb/corkscrew finishes). Capable of solo efforts but more effective in tactical sprints from small groups where he can exploit wheels.
team_tactics: Often races with limited team support and shows ability to operate isolated. Occasionally works for teammates (Mikel Bilbao) but primarily positioned for personal opportunities from breakaways rather than team-led GC trains.
terrain_preference: Multi-stage mountain races with technical descents suit him best—can recover time lost on climbs via superior descending skills. Struggles in echelons/wind and ITTs where sustained power matters more than tactical positioning.
vulnerability: Psychological fragility in decisive moments (looking over shoulder costing podium). Poor wind/echelon awareness for GC rider. ITT discipline insufficient. Mistimes efforts when forced to initiate rather than react.
key_patterns: Strong descender uses technical skill to rejoin/gain after slower climbing pace (3 observations)
Effective in uphill sprints from small groups, reading wheels tactically for stage wins (4 observations)
Operates successfully isolated without team support, bridging/attacking solo from breakaways (3 observations)
Positioning intelligence over raw power: gains time through smart wheels not attacking (3 observations)
Fades in sustained power efforts: final kilometers ITT, echelons expose weakness (3 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 shows peak form with podium at Tour, beating Vingegaard in sprint, descending versatility, staying with Evenepoel
